section_title: If any promisee neglects or refuses to afford the promisor reasonable
content:
67. If any promisee neglects or refuses to afford the promisor reasonable
neglect of
facilities for the performance of his promise, the promisor is excused by such
promisee to
afford neglect or refusal as to any non-performance caused thereby.
promisor
Illustration
reasonable
facilities for
A contracts with B to repair B's house.
performance
B neglects or refuses to point out to A the places in which his house requires
repair.

A is excused for the non-performance of the contract if it is caused by such
neglect or refusal.
CHAPTER V
OF CERTAIN RELATIONS RESEMBLING THOSE CREATED BY CONTRACT
Claim for
